name: @podkit/gpod-testing
description: Test utilities for creating and managing iPod test environments

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun && bun run build:types
scripts.test:unit: FILES=$(find src -name '*.test.ts' ! -name '*.integration.test.ts' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then bun test $FILES; else echo 'No unit tests found'; fi
scripts.test:integration: FILES=$(find src -name '*.integration.test.ts' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then bun test $FILES; else echo 'No integration tests found'; fi
